activated_rules.rule_name: Consignor found explicitly in invoice documents

consignor.certificate_value:
mfiber AB
Drottninggatan 21
SE-411 14, Gothenburg
Sweden
consignor.invoice_value:
mFiber AB
Drottninggatan 21
SE-411 14 Gothenburg
Sweden
consignor.motivation: Certificate consignor 'mfiber AB' is explicitly present in the invoice on page 1 in the issuer/header/footer text with matching country Sweden. Case normalization only.

consignee.motivation: Certificate consignee is explicitly identified in the invoice 'Ship To / Consignee' block with same company name and country Saudi Arabia after allowed normalization of case and punctuation.

goods_description.certificate_value:
PAPER IN REELS
gross weight = net weight
Shipped in container(s)
293 reels of MG Bleached Kraft
goods_description.invoice_value:
MG Bleached Kraft, 80 gsm, 74 cm
MG Bleached Kraft, 80 gsm, 102 cm
goods_description.motivation: No article number was stated in the certificate goods field. The identity-bearing main designation 'MG Bleached Kraft' from the certificate is explicitly present in both invoice line descriptions. Additional invoice qualifiers '80 gsm, 74 cm' and '80 gsm, 102 cm' are non-identity-changing additions under the rule.

rules_applied.outcome: Main rule not directly identical unit; exception sequence started

quantity.motivation: Certificate states explicit weight category and unit: GW/NW 150695 kg. Invoice states total weight as 'Total MT: 150.6950'. Using allowed MT↔KG conversion, 150.6950 MT = 150695 KG exactly. Certificate also states gross weight = net weight, so the single total weight value does not contradict the certificate.

origin.motivation: Certificate origin India is explicitly stated in the invoice in the 'Country of Origin' field as India.

overall_assessment.decision_summary: The correct document pair was identified by the certificate reference 'INV-000125', which matches invoice INV-000125 and excludes the additional invoice INV-000099. All applicable control points are verified as MATCH under the rules: consignor, consignee, goods description, quantity, and origin.
